# External Environment

Configurations and tools for **external/public** services — synced to GitHub.

## Services

| Service | Directory | Description |
|---------|-----------|-------------|
| **Jira** | `jira/` | Jira Cloud integration |
| **Wiki** | `wiki/` | Public wiki / documentation sync |
| **GitHub** | `github/` | GitHub PR and repository management |

## Usage

All scripts here use public endpoints and can be synced to GitHub freely.
